programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
programme.desc: Comedian/writer John Oliver satirically examines events in Season 13.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Call Me by Your Name
programme.desc: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) communities in America.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Game Night
programme.desc: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Bad Education
programme.desc: A Long Island school superintendent and his assistant are credited with bringing the district unprecedented prestige. Frank is a master of positive messaging, whether before an audience of community leaders or in an office with a concerned student or parent. That changes when a student reporter uncovers an embezzlement scheme of epic proportions, prompting Frank to devise an elaborate cover-up.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: Paterno
programme.desc: Penn State football coach Joe Paterno becomes embroiled in a sexual abuse scandal.

programme.title: 38 at the Garden
programme.desc: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: Mountainhead
programme.desc: Four friends reunite during worldwide economic turmoil.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: A disappointing group-stage exit at the 2024 Copa América triggers Berhalter's firing and raises questions about the state of the USMNT.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Alive Day Memories: Home From Iraq
programme.desc: Ten soldiers who suffered traumatic injuries during the Iraq war discuss their experiences with actor James Gandolfini.

programme.title: Escape From Kabul
programme.desc: Examining 18 days in August 2021, from the U.S. withdrawal of its troops from Afghanistan through the subsequent evacuation of tens of thousands of Afghan citizens from Kabul airport after the Taliban seized the city.

programme.title: Prime Minister
programme.desc: Chronicling Jacinda Ardern's unexpected journey as New Zealand's 40th Prime Minister, this documentary offers an unfiltered window into her years in power.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: Vying for a spot in the U.S. Open finals, Anthony "Simo" Simonsen and Australia's Jason "Belmo" Belmonte face off as tempers escalate and injuries flare.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: At the Pete Weber Classic in Springfield, Missouri, named after one of the sports greats, bowler extraordinaire EJ Tackett must fend off Belmo and Simo to reclaim the top prize.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: 200 bowlers from 18 different countries descend upon Reno, Nevada to compete in the month-long World Series of Bowling.

programme.title: Born to Bowl
programme.desc: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

programme.title: Alien 3
programme.desc: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
programme.desc: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: How We Get Free
programme.desc: Over the course of two years, Elisabeth Epps works to end cash bail on all fronts, from bailing people out of jail to running for office as one of the first abolitionist candidates in Colorado.

programme.title: Finding the Way Home
programme.desc: The stories of eight children who have been reunited with family members or placed in loving foster homes after being exposed to the distressing conditions prevalent in orphanages and institutions around the world.

programme.title: Stopping The Steal
programme.desc: An inside account of President Trump's challenge to the results of the 2020 presidential election as told by former White House staff and appointees.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: When Doug's work in Agrestic is investigated, he abdicates from responsibility and takes refuge in Ren Mar.

programme.title: Weeds
programme.desc: Left behind in the desert by Nancy, Andy joins a group of immigrants to get back home.

programme.title: Weeds

programme.title: Next Level Chef (USA)
programme.desc: The American version of the reality television series hosted by Gordon Ramsay. Each remaining contestant must create a brunch dish that incorporates both sweet and savoury elements in just 45 minutes - at the end of the challenge, one aspiring chef must once again go home.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Matt, Mary and their two children don't use their backyard because a neighbouring ravine has taken over - Brian and Sarah create a beautiful entertaining and play space for the whole family to enjoy, but they face environmental challenges as they do so.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Single guys Connor, Jamie and Tim compete for the affections of receptionist Lacey from Hertfordshire, but which of the three single shoppers' fashion choices will earn them a date? Lacey is looking for love and is hoping that one of three guy shoppers can pick her out a dream outfit and be her perfect match - Manchester tech recruiter Jamie, butler-in-the-buff Connor, and photography student Tim are battling it out to win a blind date with her. The guys will be shopping in Manchester City Centre, but who will Dress to Impress?

programme.title: The Princess Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series following Princess Andre, the daughter of Peter Andre and Katie Price, as she prepares to turn 18 and navigates her road to adulthood - in this episode, Princess and Junior are enjoying their time in Ibiza and are joined by Jasmine, Junior's girlfriend, and Georgia, who is Princess' social media manager. After a nervous Princess prepares for her first catwalk at the Ibiza Fashion Festival, Princess and Georgia explore Ibiza and receive a surprising phone call being invited to a party - the pair attend the event where Princess attempts to flirt for the first time since recently becoming single, but she quickly realises that she might be a bit rusty and needs a bit more practice. Back in the UK, Princess prepares for a big meeting with Superdrug to find out if she will be continuing her brand ambassadorship with them before attending an event where she reconnects with an old childhood friend.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Dan has been out of the Essex scene for a week, but is it time for his return? Will he face the music and clear his name after all those rumours?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Unfashionable Behaviour: US reality series. The women return to Utah, but the mystery of Heather's black eye has everyone uneasy as Whitney presses for answers. [S] S3 Ep13

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series following the lavish lifestyle of New Jersey housewives and their families. Jennifer and Danielle tell two different versions of what went down in the aftermath of Teresa's tumultuous Tulum party, Margaret worries for Joe after receiving some unnerving test results from his doctor, and Danielle hosts a relaunch party for Boujie Kidz where Rachel's frustrations with Jen Fessler hit an all-time high as Jen continues to overstep established boundaries.

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec return with their never-ending money ladder, a limitless pot of cash, and a stack of fiendish number-based questions - this episode sees competitive father-and-daughter duo David and Emma take on the challenge. Having already overcome significant personal hurdles, David's risk-taking must be balanced by his level-headed daughter to help them scale the dizzying heights of the ladder - if not, they will crash out before they can cash out. No matter the outcome, their family's competitive spirit has put them in a perfect position to inspire a memorable win.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Gemma Atkinson, Karen Hauer and Josh Widdicombe all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton welcomes office manager Shirley, financial management assistant Cameron, and police investigation officer Adele as they take on puzzles and the iconic Wheel for a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: After Amber's shock return, she's yet to confront either Dan or Chloe, but the pair have unfinished business to sort first. Will Dan come clean and tell Chloe every single painful detail about Amber? And what about Amber? Will she finally get her closure with Dan?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Trials and Tribulations: US reality series. Heather and Jen argue about the origins of Heather's black eye, and rumours abound at Heather's book cover reveal party. [S] S3 Ep14

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series following the lavish lifestyle of New Jersey housewives and their families. The Gorgas take Donna to a lunch where Melissa expresses concern for her mother's mental health, Margaret comes clean to Dolores about what she told Jackie in a fit of rage, Melissa hosts a fashion show for Envy, Danielle extends an invitation to her father as the Cabral kids are starring in an upcoming music video, and Teresa hosts her first live podcast event where a night of finding inner peace erupts into more chaos for Danielle and Jennifer.

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Natalie Cassidy, Sam Aston and Lou Sanders join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, trying to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win £50,000 for charity.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton welcomes events assistant Alex, weight loss coach Jennifer, and business owner Chris as they face each other to solve puzzles and beat the Wheel for a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: It's another dramatic week in Essex, as Elma and Amber finally come face to face, and Harry and Amy admit there has been a lot of miscommunication between them. Ella throws an evening get together for Dani, Lauren, Joe, Junaid and Jodie. Harry is also invited, but doesn't attend on Amy's advice - his noticeable absence quickly sparks speculation among the group. Elsewhere, Sophie is determined to make Jordan's last birthday before fatherhood one he'll never forget, and Saff brings the girls together to lift Sophie's spirits during a tough pregnancy.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of family life. Peter gets in touch with his feminine side after a female co-worker sues him for sexual harassment.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. Lois's aunt dies and leaves her the Cherrywood Mansion. The family moves in to the new mansion in Newport, only to lose their fortune after Peter makes an extravagant purchase at a charity auction.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. Peter enlists the aid of the Pope in a quest to bond with his devout father after he comes to live with the family when he is forced to retire from his lifelong job at the mill.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. As Stan continues to dominate the household, Francine finds herself idolising a group of women who seem to have it all. She tries to impress them and even lies in order to gain acceptance into their group, until she realises they are not as perfect as they seem.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Crystal Mess: Animated comedy. When Mr Frond lends Tina a crystal which his girlfriend claims has special powers, it seems to work and she soon becomes a human good luck charm. [S,AD] S12 Ep2

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. It's Aimee's big night at the opening of the school play, but will she show with deepening problems at home and the rest of school thinking that she posted defamatory TikToks? Meanwhile, Reece's middle-class cousin Tyreece comes to stay with him and Jodie - he's been given a final warning by the police and his mum wants him to get away from the 'bad influence' mates she believes to be the problem, but he wastes no time in stealing some parcels from a delivery van to impress the boys. When Christopher's mum's ring goes missing, Christopher believes Reece took it as he's the only person who knew where he kept it - their burgeoning relationship is rocked as their class assumptions about each other are back to the fore, but Reece is forced to make a tough decision when he discovers who actually did steal the ring.

Newlyweds Cheryl and Gavin love their new home, but Cheryl doesn't love the sound of Gavin's woodworking in their garage - Brian and Sarah come to their aid by building a dedicated woodshop and adding some chic new living space in their urban backyard.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: 21-year-old skater boy Seb from Birmingham is looking for love - he's got three single girls shopping in Manchester for him. The twist is that he doesn't get to see the girls and has to judge them entirely based on the outfits they pick him - whoever best hits his brief will win a date! Dancer Grace, barber Ella, and make-up student Hope are battling it out for Seb's affections, but who will Dress to Impress?

programme.title: The Princess Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series following Princess Andre, the daughter of Peter Andre and Katie Price, as she prepares to turn 18 and navigates her road to adulthood - in this episode, it's only a few days until Princess' birthday but she still hasn't decided how to celebrate. After Peter tries to help her make her mind up about what she wants to do, Princess attends her 18th birthday cover shoot for OK magazine before she and Emily go to an event together where Princess opens up about boys and not knowing how to talk to them despite having recently been in touch with ex-boyfriend Brandon. Having invited Brandon and his friends to a day out at Thorpe Park - and received the first samples for her make-up range - a media storm causes upset for Princess and puts her in an awkward position with her family.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: After Amber's shock return, she's yet to confront either Dan or Chloe, but the pair have unfinished business to sort first. Will Dan come clean and tell Chloe every single painful detail about Amber? And what about Amber? Will she finally get her closure with Dan?

programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Reece is inspired by Christopher to try to track down the dad that he has never met - desperate to understand his family history and to shed some light on why he is the way he is, he asks Jodie to reveal his dad's identity. When she tells him that his name is Disneyland Darren, Christopher has Reece's back every step of the way in the search for his dad - when they do eventually track him down, his identity is a huge shock and Reece is left to wonder if this is a relationship that he wants to pursue. Meanwhile, Aimee and Mia-Louise fall out as Aimee is worried that Ziad is scamming Mia-Louise for money - Mia-Louise bites back by telling her that she's embarrassing herself by being interested in Christopher as he isn't interested in 'girls like her'. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of Badger's Drift is disturbed when schoolteacher Connie Bishop screams in fright that she has an intruder. Later, at a meeting of the Frobisher Night committee, Connie clashes with trophy wife Zukie Richardson who wants to make the fundraising event grander with cash from her wealthy husband. When the body of a councillor who also opposed Zukie's plans is found in Connie's garden, the police are called, and DCI Tom Barnaby has another case of murder to deal with. Slimy womaniser Laurence Mann offers to change Connie's locks, but she wakes in the night to find him in the summerhouse with his throat cut. Not wishing to be alone in the cottage, Connie asks shy sculptor Justin Hooper to stay in her spare room - but he awakes to find her sleepwalking and trying to kiss him. When the police arrive, Connie confesses that she may have committed the murders in her sleep, saying she heard voices saying 'kill him'. But is she telling the truth?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Carson's Circus has rolled into town and Will, Geordie and the rest of the Grantchester family are making the trip to it - they delight in watching mind-bending illusions and death-defying stunts, but the very next morning dawns with Errol Macabre, one of the circus performers, being found dead having been shot with a crossbow that was used in a magic trick. Was this a tragic accident caused by a malfunctioning prop? When Geordie sees that the crossbow has been tampered with, he realises this was no such thing and that someone wanted Errol dead - with the circus closed and the rest of the performers having alibis for the time of the murder, who could have possibly done this?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Will wants to grab a quiet moment with Geordie to tell him that he and Bonnie have decided to leave Grantchester, but any chance he might have had is thrown out the window when Geordie receives a call about a dead body at the River View Hotel - as the time for Sunday service approaches, Will and Bonnie enter the church but are stopped short on discovery of an abandoned baby inside. Upon inspecting the blanket the baby is wrapped in, Will and Bonnie see that it is marked River View Hotel and learn that a young woman had checked in there the night before and made a phone call to the halfway house - after Ernie reports that he witnessed a young girl wearing a school blazer enter the church that morning, Will and Geordie probe into the staff and pupils of the Fidelis School for Girls and secrets start to emerge that turn the entire investigation on its head. When Will later finds an inopportune moment to tell Geordie that he is leaving, his friend is stung by the news...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when the body of the co-owner of a chip shop is found in his own freezer - a seemingly successful entrepreneur and dedicated family man, Vera uncovers secrets, lies and some unforgivable behaviour as she tries to unwrap the case. Once the investigation begins, it soon becomes apparent that our enigmatic entrepreneur has left behind debts, broken promises, ruined lives and seriously interfered in family business that was not his own - now Vera must find who is responsible for the this unsavoury chip shop assault and battery.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie is still mourning Will's departure when Mrs C charges into the pub with reports of a gentleman breaking into the vicarage - Geordie leaps into action and heads straight inside the vicarage to confront the intruder. A tussle ensues between them before Geordie is confronted by the realisation that this man is no burglar - he's the new vicar. The man introduces himself as the Reverend Alphy Kottaram - as Alphy settles into life in Grantchester, his first order of business at the church is a funeral service for local landowner Albert Baron, who apparently took his own life - when the service is abruptly interrupted by the Walkers, a family warring with the Barons, a fight breaks out in the church. As the Walkers leave, Albert's son Harvey accuses the Walkers of murdering his father - as Alphy corrals the two families into the vicarage and Geordie arrives to investigate, an initially reluctant Alphy finds himself drawn into solving clues and uncovering buried secrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy receives a mysterious letter in the post - this is the second time he's received post of its kind, but the meaning behind both letters entirely escapes him. Alphy doesn't have long to dwell on this because he has been invited to Marwood Manor for dinner and a party - Alphy plans to use this opportunity to drum up funds for the ailing church, but when Lady Marwood announces that it's time to play hide and seek, Alphy finds himself opening a cupboard while looking for a suitable hiding spot and is surprised to discover a dead body inside. The body is that of Dennis, the Marwoods' gardener who had apparently left the manor only a day before without a word - a blackmail letter is found on him, but it's not immediately clear whether the letter is addressed to Dennis or if he'd written it for someone else. As Alphy and Geordie investigate the murky world of the manor, they begin to uncover strange secrets and illicit desires amongst the residents and staff there.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two detective constables in Manchester and written by BAFTA Award-winner Sally Wainwright. When DC Rachel Bailey is dumped, her best friend DC Janet Scott is there to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, DCI Gill Murray takes Rachel, Janet and the team through their new murder case at work: a young Turkish woman has been killed in her home and her death made to look like suicide. Rachel throws herself into the investigation, soon discovering that the victim's husband was having an affair - she takes a risk when she questions the man's mistress, but has her high-stakes approach jeopardised the case, or will she get results? Rachel is also occupied with investigating her ex and is horrified to find that he is married with children - at the same time, Janet is contacted by the brother of a school friend who was abducted and murdered when they were still at primary school. He asks if she will reopen the case - and Janet agrees to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama following the personal and professional lives of two Manchester detectives. Things become even more complicated for Rachel when she reveals to her ex Nick that she is pregnant - and his unsympathetic response confirms her decision to have a termination. At work, the team face a gruesome case in which a mother of two has been brutally raped and left to bleed to death in the boot of her car. The team get a lucky break when CCTV footage reveals a man following the woman just before she disappeared - the same man who had been seen asking for a taxi to the Walden Estate. The police go to the estate to make house-to-house enquiries, and a sharp piece of detective work from Rachel leads to the arrest of teenager Luke Farrell. However, Luke's arrest sparks a series of events which leads to further tragedy, much to the horror of the team. Meanwhile, Janet steps up her investigation into her childhood friend Veronica's death and meets with an officer who investigated the murder.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan gets a job up north and decides to get himself sacked in order to earn an extra week's wages.

programme.desc: A desperate Jo pretends she is pregnant when Andy moves to hit her. Ross confronts Donna about her plan to leave the police force and Anna exploits Matthew's attraction to her.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Clarissa swallows her pride and apologises, but Liz vows to settle the score with her. Dev receives a tempting offer during his dinner date, and Becky decides to play matchmaker.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Dev can't believe his luck when Nina makes a play for him. A furious Kevin uncovers Tony's scheme to undercut his prices at the garage and Liz turns the tables on Clarissa.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The repercussions of a car accident leave Nick struggling to keep the peace, Jo is concerned about her recently widowed father, and Greengrass's brother is looking for property in the area.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick suspects foul play when a lay preacher is injured in a shooting posse, and Greengrass gains possession of a secret recipe for the famous Aidensfield Bun.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace's team recovers from recent distressing events, they are called to the scene of an awful car accident when a local hotelier is killed by an oncoming driver who cruelly flees the site of the crash and leaves him to die - as Roy tackles what may prove to be one of his most complex cases yet, DC Vee Wilde faces a challenge of her own when she comes face to face with her estranged father after many years. Meanwhile, Grace's life takes a devastating turn as his wedding to Cleo draws near...

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Now living away from home, Esme visits the Keatings one morning with her friend Mae to bring some washing round - Geordie is happy to see Esme and tries to put a positive spin on things, but Cathy is not best pleased. Later that morning, Geordie and Cathy are confronted by their worst fears when they hear of a young woman's death at Esme's office - it turns out to be Mae, who has died from anaphylaxis following an allergic reaction. Medical results reveal that Mae had an allergy to almonds - it had been Mae's birthday that day and Geordie speculates that it could've been her birthday cake that was the cause of the allergic reaction, but when the test results show up negative, a mystery emerges around how Mae ingested almonds. It becomes apparent that someone had done this purposefully with the intention of murdering Mae, but why would someone want to kill a young woman like this? Meanwhile, Alphy is eager to update the Bishop on the hard work he's been doing on the church.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie and Larry are called out to Marcus Blakely's farm one morning following the discovery of a skeleton in his field - when the skeleton turns out to be that of a Roman soldier, a team of archaeologists arrive soon after to set up a dig site while causing quite a stir in the village. Mrs C hears the news and convinces Alphy and Jack to walk down and take a look - that night sees the lead archaeologist Henry host a talk at the village hall that showcases their findings and further plans for the dig. The next morning dawns with Henry being found dead - and eerily lying in the same spot in which the skeleton was discovered. As Alphy and Geordie investigate Henry and his fellow archaeologists further, they uncover a tangled web of betrayal and deceit, in which no-one is quite who they say they are. Meanwhile, Alphy is still processing the news that he's out of a job and looks for a sign from God about what he should do next - should he give up and leave, or stay and fight?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When a rape and murder case goes to trial, DCI Gill Murray is determined to see defendant Georgios Stelikos convicted, but the case is made more complicated because only one of the alleged victims is prepared to testify. When Rachel gives evidence, she is horrified to discover that her ex Nick is the defence barrister. Nick's cross-examination shakes her when he uses information which passed between them when they were together, but events take a shocking turn as the verdict is delivered.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When porn actress Vicky Birkinshaw is arrested on suspicion of murdering her husband, Rachel and Janet are convinced that she is hiding the truth, but even they are shocked by the revelations to come. Rachel's professional life hangs in the balance when DCI Gill Murray finds out that her relationship with barrister Nick Savage could have put a case at risk. Janet's affair with a colleague is also uncovered, but has Rachel overstepped the mark by confronting Janet about it?

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th entry in the James Bond film series. Media tycoon Elliot Carver is one of the most powerful men in the world - his newspaper Tomorrow is a world leader in that industry, and he is about to launch a satellite network to capitalise on his success. However, he is hungry for more business - especially from the Asian market - and when a British Royal Navy ship is mysteriously sunk in the South China Sea by unknown means and any survivors of the attack are killed afterwards, Tomorrow manages to be first to tell the world that the survivors' bodies were riddled with Chinese bullets. China repeatedly denies any responsibility for the attack, but Admiral Roebuck of the Royal Navy insists that China are to blame. However, M - the venerable boss of MI6 - suspects that there is more to the attack and therefore sends James Bond on a mission to find the real cause behind the sinking of the British ship. Can 007 do so and stop war breaking out between Britain and China?

programme.desc: Thad Beaumont (Timothy Hutton) has had success writing novels under both his real name and his pseudonym, George Stark, which he uses to publish base thrillers. When word gets out that they are one and the same, the author holds a mock funeral for Stark. But after a rash of murders eerily similar to those in the Stark books, Thad and his wife, Liz (Amy Madigan), realize that Stark is real and responsible, and must work with local Sheriff Pangborn (Michael Rooker) to stop him.
